response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale (notably Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec), and matches the language requirements (JavaScript, Java, C, C++). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or growth/measurement infrastructure — which are central to this Principal-level role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-team platform leadership at IC6 scope make this a borderline fit.
strengths: 15+ years across diverse stacks including high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, workshops)
Polyglot proficiency matching JD languages (JS/TS, Java, C/C++, Python-adjacent)
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth-platform experience
Limited evidence of IC6/Principal-scope cross-team platform leadership
Light on telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis experience

key_factors.factor: Depth of engineering experience and scale (Sociomantic)
Unclear Principal-level cross-team leadership track record
